metadata.title: Tuntubi Arteon – Tallafi da ra'ayoyi kan kayan aiki kyauta
metadata.description: Tuntubi kungiyar Arteon. Ka ba da rahoton matsala, ka ba da shawarar sabon kayan aiki ko ka yi tambaya game da kayan aikinmu kyauta don hotuna, SEO, launuka da lambobin QR. Muna amsa cikin ranar aiki guda.

hero.title: Tuntubi kungiyar Arteon
hero.description: Ba da rahoton matsala, ba da shawarar sabon kayan aiki ko yi tambaya — muna amsa cikin ranar aiki guda

intro.title: Kana da tambaya ko shawara?
intro.textBefore: Muna farin ciki da jin ra'ayoyinku game da kayan aikinmu. Idan ka sami matsala, kana da ra'ayi don sabon kayan aiki ko kana bukatar taimako — rubuta mana a
intro.textAfter: . Muna amsa cikin ranar aiki guda.

cta.title: Komawa zuwa kayan aiki
cta.description: Kayan aiki 10 kyauta don aiki da hotuna, rubutu da launuka
